query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `pageviews` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `sessionId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `url` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `referrer` varchar(500),
  `country` varchar(10),
  `city` varchar(100),
  `browser` varchar(50),
  `os` varchar(50),
  `device` enum('desktop','mobile','tablet') DEFAULT 'desktop',
  `utmSource` varchar(200),
  `utmMedium` varchar(200),
  `utmCampaign` varchar(200),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `pageviews_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  INDEX `idx_pageviews_session` (`sessionId`),
  INDEX `idx_pageviews_created` (`createdAt`),
  INDEX `idx_pageviews_url` (`url`(100))
);

  CONSTRAINT `pageviews_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  INDEX `idx_pageviews_session` (`sessionId`),
  INDEX `idx_pageviews_created` (`createdAt`),
  INDEX `idx_pageviews_url` (`url`(100))
